common.thankYouMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.darkModeDesc: Switch between light and dark themes
settings.profileVisibilityDesc: Allow others to see your profile activity

landing.heroDefault: The Bridge to El Salvador's Future
landing.descBuilder: Connect with global capital, showcase your vision, and launch your startup in the world's first Bitcoin country.
landing.descInvestor: Access exclusive deal flow from the world's most rapidly growing digital economy. Verified projects, direct connections.
landing.globalEcosystemDesc: Direct integration with international markets and the Bitcoin standard economy.
landing.verifiedTrustDesc: Identity verification and due diligence tools built directly into the platform.
landing.directAccessDesc: No intermediaries. Connect directly with founders and funders via secure messaging.

login.extensionNotFound: No Nostr extension found. Install Alby, nos2x, or another NIP-07 extension.
login.downloadEncryptedBackup: Download an encrypted backup of your key
login.passkeyWarning: Your key is encrypted and stored on Nostr relays. Recover it from any device with the same passkey.

signup.nostrAuthDesc: Nostrbook uses Nostr-native authentication. No passwords. No emails. Just cryptographic keys you truly own.
signup.cannotRecover: We cannot recover this for you. If you lose it, your account is gone forever.
signup.seedPhraseHelp: You can log in with this 12-word seed phrase instead of your secret key.
signup.backupChoose: Choose one or more ways to back up. Copy the nsec or seed phrase above, or download an encrypted key file:
signup.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 16 characters and include both letters and numbers. All other characters are welcome too. Store the file somewhere safe — you'll need this password to unlock it.
signup.passkeyWarning: Your key is encrypted with your passkey and stored on Nostr relays. You can recover it from any device using the same passkey. Always keep a separate backup above.
signup.downloadFirst: You must download your encrypted key file before continuing.
signup.setupDesc: Set up your display name and role to get started.

passkeySave.title: Save your login?
passkeySave.description: Save a passkey so you can log in next time with just your fingerprint or face — no need to enter your key again.
passkeySave.benefitEncrypted: Your key is encrypted and stored on Nostr relays via NIP-K1
passkeySave.benefitBiometric: Log in instantly with fingerprint or face on any device
passkeySave.saving: Complete the biometric prompt on your device...
passkeySave.savedDesc: You can now log in with just your fingerprint or face.

team.title: Orchestrating the Future
team.mission: Nostrbook is a community platform built on Nostr. We are dedicated to connecting people through transparency, open protocols, and trusted infrastructure.
team.fillFields: Please fill in all required fields.
team.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
team.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

elena.name: Elena Castillo
elena.bio: Former FinTech regulator turned Bitcoin advocate. Leading the strategic vision of Nostrbook.

marcus.name: Marcus Green
marcus.bio: 20 years in VC. Focused on bridging Silicon Valley capital with Salvadoran opportunity.

roberto.name: Roberto Diaz
roberto.bio: Building the digital rails for the new economy. Open source contributor.

messages.e2eEncrypted: All messages are end-to-end encrypted with NIP-17
